title: Sign in and reach the dashboard
description: An existing user can sign in with valid credentials and land on the authenticated dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the dashboard is displayed
Verify authenticated account information is visible

title: Create a new account with an optional referral code
description: A new user can sign up with the required account details and an optional referral code, and is taken to a successful post-registration state.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill in the name field with a unique display name
Fill in the email field with a unique email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Fill in the referral code field with a referral code
Submit the registration form
Verify a registration success confirmation is visible

title: Approve a withdrawal request as an admin
description: An authenticated admin can approve a pending withdrawal request and see its status update.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the admin withdrawals section link
Approve a pending withdrawal request
Verify the request status is updated to approved

title: Complete a task and earn coins
description: An authenticated user can complete a task from the task list and see the reward reflected in their account activity.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open tasks
Start a task
Complete the task action
Verify the task is marked complete
Verify updated earnings are visible in the account activity

title: Submit a PayPal withdrawal request
description: A logged-in user can choose PayPal, enter payout details, submit a withdrawal request, and receive confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the wallet
Select PayPal as the payout method
Fill in the payout detail field with a valid PayPal account identifier
Fill in a valid withdrawal amount
Submit the withdrawal request
Verify a withdrawal confirmation is visible

title: Review pending withdrawals as an admin
description: An authenticated admin can open withdrawal management and view pending requests.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the admin withdrawals section link
Verify pending withdrawal requests are displayed

title: Mark an approved withdrawal as paid
description: An authenticated admin can mark an approved withdrawal as paid and see the payment status update.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the admin withdrawals section link
Mark an approved withdrawal as paid
Verify the request status is updated to paid

title: Reject a withdrawal request as an admin
description: An authenticated admin can reject a pending withdrawal request and see its status update.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the admin withdrawals section link
Reject a pending withdrawal request
Verify the request status is updated to rejected

title: View updated balance after earning coins
description: An authenticated user can see their balance and recent earnings reflected after completing a task.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open tasks
Start a task
Complete the task action
Click the link to return to the dashboard
Verify the balance is displayed
Verify recent activity reflects the earned coins

title: Load the task list after signing in
description: An authenticated user can open the task page and see available tasks ready to start.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open tasks
Verify available tasks are displayed
Verify the task list is visible

title: Copy and review referral link details
description: An authenticated member can open referrals, copy their personalized invite link, and review referral earnings and invited users.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the referrals section link
Click the copy link control
Verify a confirmation of copied link is visible
Verify referral earnings and invited users are displayed

title: Review withdrawal history after submitting a request
description: A logged-in user can open the wallet after submitting a withdrawal request and see the new transaction in history.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the wallet
Select PayPal as the payout method
Fill in the payout detail field with a valid PayPal account identifier
Fill in a valid withdrawal amount
Submit the withdrawal request
Wait for the wallet history to update
Verify the new withdrawal appears in transaction history
Verify the withdrawal status is visible

title: View a personalized referral link after login
description: An authenticated member can reach the referrals page and see a personalized invite link.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the referrals section link
Verify a personalized referral link is displayed

title: Keep access to the dashboard after refreshing the session
description: An authenticated user remains signed in while navigating to protected areas during the same browser session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the dashboard
Click the link to open tasks
Click the link to return to the dashboard
Verify the dashboard remains accessible
Verify the user stays signed in

title: Review referral earnings and invited users after login
description: An authenticated member can open referrals and see their referral performance summary.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the referrals section link
Verify referral earnings are displayed
Verify invited users are displayed

title: Open the referral page and copy the invite link
description: An authenticated user can open referrals, copy their personalized invite link, and review referral performance details.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open referrals
Copy the referral link
Verify a referral link confirmation is visible
Verify referral earnings and invited users are displayed

title: Open referral sharing from the public site
description: A visitor can navigate from the landing page to sign up or log in to access the referral experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sign up link
Verify the sign up page is displayed
Navigate back to /
Click the log in link
Verify the login page is displayed

title: See validation when withdrawal amount is too low
description: A logged-in user sees a validation message when trying to request a withdrawal below the minimum amount.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the wallet
Select PayPal as the payout method
Fill in the payout detail field with a valid PayPal account identifier
Fill in a withdrawal amount below the minimum
Submit the withdrawal request
Verify a withdrawal amount validation error is visible

title: See a fallback referral link when the site URL is unavailable
description: An authenticated member can open referrals and still see a usable invite link even when the site URL fallback is needed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the referrals section link
Verify a referral link is displayed

title: Load the referral page with no referral activity
description: An authenticated member can open referrals and see an empty state when they have no referral activity.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the referrals section link
Verify an empty state message is visible

title: View admin withdrawal management empty state
description: An authenticated admin can open withdrawal management and see an empty state when there are no requests.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the admin withdrawals section link
Verify an empty state message is visible
